source.name: New to Denmark (SIRI) — Study at a higher-education institution

requirements.label: Admission to a higher-education institution
requirements.detail: Admission to an approved Danish higher-education programme.

requirements.label: Funds requirement
requirements.detail: If you pay tuition or don't have a scholarship, show DKK 7,426/month (2026 level) — up to DKK 89,112 for a year.

requirements.label: Tuition fees (non-EU/EEA)
requirements.detail: Non-EU/EEA students usually pay tuition; payment is often required before the permit.

requirements.label: Health insurance on arrival
requirements.detail: Cover for the period before you receive your Danish CPR/yellow card.

requirements.label: Valid passport
requirements.detail: A passport valid for the residence-permit period.

requirements.label: Tuition / funds transfer
requirements.detail: Transfer fees or living funds with a low-FX provider.

requirements.label: Connectivity on arrival
requirements.detail: An eSIM gives you a Danish number and data on landing.

requirements.label: Accommodation
requirements.detail: Arrange housing early, especially in Copenhagen.
